info.name: RouteSphere SMS API
info.description: API endpoints for SMS operations in RouteSphere, including bulk SMS submission with tenant hierarchy and rule pipeline processing

item.name: Bulk SMS Operations

request.description: Test single SMS submission with valid credentials. Expected: 200 OK with 1 ACCEPTED task.

body.raw:
[
  {
    "taskId": "task-001",
    "clienttransId": "client-123",
    "senderAddress": "TESTCORP",
    "destinationAddress": "8801711111111",
    "messageText": "Hello, this is a test SMS",
    "username": "testuser",
    "password": "testpass123",
    "priority": "NORMAL"
  },
  {
    "taskId": "task-002",
    "clienttransId": "client-124",
    "senderAddress": "ALERTS",
    "destinationAddress": "8801722222222",
    "messageText": "Your OTP is 123456",
    "username": "testuser",
    "password": "testpass123",
    "priority": "HIGH"
  },
  {
    "taskId": "task-003",
    "clienttransId": "client-125",
    "senderAddress": "PROMO",
    "destinationAddress": "8801733333333",
    "messageText": "Special offer: 50% discount today!",
    "username": "testuser",
    "password": "testpass123",
    "priority": "LOW"
  }
]

request.description: Test batch processing with 3 SMS tasks. Expected: 200 OK with 3 ACCEPTED tasks.
Test authentication failure with invalid credentials. Expected: 200 OK with 1 REJECTED task (authentication failure).

item.name: Test 4: Mixed Valid and Invalid Credentials

body.raw:
[
  {
    "taskId": "task-valid-001",
    "clienttransId": "tx-valid-001",
    "senderAddress": "TESTCORP",
    "destinationAddress": "8801711111111",
    "messageText": "Test message with valid credentials",
    "username": "testuser",
    "password": "testpass123",
    "priority": "NORMAL"
  },
  {
    "taskId": "task-invalid-001",
    "clienttransId": "tx-invalid-001",
    "senderAddress": "TESTCORP",
    "destinationAddress": "8801722222222",
    "messageText": "Test message with invalid credentials",
    "username": "wronguser",
    "password": "wrongpass",
    "priority": "NORMAL"
  },
  {
    "taskId": "task-valid-002",
    "clienttransId": "tx-valid-002",
    "senderAddress": "TESTCORP",
    "destinationAddress": "8801733333333",
    "messageText": "Another test message with valid credentials",
    "username": "testuser",
    "password": "testpass123",
    "priority": "HIGH"
  }
]

request.description: Test partial failure with mixed valid and invalid credentials. Expected: 200 OK with 2 ACCEPTED and 1 REJECTED tasks.

body.raw:
[
  {
    "taskId": "priority-high-001",

]

request.description: Test all three priority levels (HIGH, NORMAL, LOW). Expected: 200 OK with 3 ACCEPTED tasks.

request.description: Performance test with 10 SMS tasks. Expected: 200 OK with 10 ACCEPTED tasks. Can be scaled to 100+ for stress testing.
Test with only required fields (no clienttransId, no priority). Expected: 200 OK with 1 ACCEPTED task.

item.description: Bulk SMS submission endpoints with automatic tenant identification from socket binding
